description.ko: 유리 프리즘을 통과하는 백색광이 화려한 무지개 스펙트럼으로 분해되며 복잡한 가성(caustic) 패턴을 만들어내는 경이로운 시각적 표현입니다.
description.en: A stunning visual representation of white light passing through a glass prism, breaking into a vibrant rainbow spectrum with intricate caustic patterns.

prompt: PRISM-2 style, close-up of a triangular crystal prism on a minimalist white surface, a single beam of intense white light entering, refracted into a wide, vivid rainbow spectrum on the background, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, soft shadows, caustic light effects, cinematic lighting, sharp focus, ray tracing.
